title: Accept The Confirm Alert
goal: Trigger the confirm alert on the DemoQA alerts page, accept it, and stop after the page shows that Ok was selected.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the confirm alert, accept it, and stop after the page shows the result.
review_notes: Confirm-alert task on DemoQA using explicit dialog acceptance and DOM-visible result verification.

steps.explanation: I triggered the confirm alert and accepted it so the page can show the selected result.

action.summary: I accepted the confirm alert and the page now shows that Ok was selected.

steps.explanation: The result text is visible on the page, so I am ending the task.
